description: Larvling lifecycle hooks for conversation tracking and extraction

hooks.command: export PYTHONPATH="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts" && PY=$(python3 --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo python3 || echo python) && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/preflight.py" && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hooks/session_start.py"
export PYTHONPATH="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts" && PY=$(python3 --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo python3 || echo python) && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hooks/prompt.py"

export PYTHONPATH="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts" && PY=$(python3 --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo python3 || echo python) && _TMP=$(mktemp) && cat >"$_TMP" && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hooks/stop.py" <"$_TMP"; $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/analyze.py" <"$_TMP"; rm -f "$_TMP"
export PYTHONPATH="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts" && PY=$(python3 --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo python3 || echo python) && $PY "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/hooks/session_end.py"
